Preview в—џ

Never in a million years did Blade think he'd see you again, especially not here, not now. Hell, he threw away even the idea of ever seeing you again; it just seemed highly implausible that you'd suddenly pop back up after disappearing out of the blue so many years ago. Nevertheless, here you stand, alongside Kafka as she 'introduces' you to himвЂ” as if you were a complete stranger to him. "Now, now, Bladie... don't be so mean to the new recruit so soon." Her silky voice rings throughout the room.

His cold, dead eyes look you up and down, "You've changed." A thought that slices through the silence between you two. It had been hundreds of years since you inexplicably disappeared... a close comrade and friend. He knew that you had expressed feelings of wanting to explore, travel, and live somewhere else but, never did Blade imagine you just leaving with a poor excuse for a 'goodbye note'. All he was left with was a note with the words "I'm sorry." written on the page above your signature.

One thing led to another, and you decided to join the Stellaron Hunters. And now you're faced with the past, faced with an explanation, an explanation for why you had to leave like that, why you couldn't at least tell him that you were leaving.
